title: PolicyDecision
description: OPA policy evaluation result returned by executive-agent policy.py. Encodes an allow/deny decision with violation explanations. Derived from ACC policy-violation detection analogue.

allow.description: True if the policy evaluation permits the requested action or goal; false if any violation was triggered.

violations.description: Human-readable violation messages produced by the Rego violations[] set. Empty when allow=true.

explanation.description: Optional narrative explanation of the decision, suitable for logging or user-facing output.

rule.description: OPA rule evaluated within the package, e.g. 'allow' or 'violations'.

evaluated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this policy decision was evaluated.

cached.description: True if this result was returned from the LRU cache rather than a live OPA evaluation.

input_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the policy input document. Used as LRU cache key.
